rule: Arrow keys
Make 24 from 4 numbers — each used once

title: Aim Trainer
rule: Click the targets as fast as you can. 20 seconds

title: Air Hockey
rule: Drag your mallet · first to 7 goals wins

title: Anagrams
rule: Find as many words as you can in the 6-letter rack — 90 seconds

title: Asteroids
rule: Rotate, thrust, shoot the rocks

title: Bankroll
rule: Beat the house across 3+ hands — dealer stands on 17, start with 20 chips

title: Battleship
rule: Sink the CPU fleet on the 8x8 grid

title: Blackjack
rule: Bet Seeds and beat the dealer — blackjack pays 3:2

title: Block Cascade
rule: Move left/right · tap or up to rotate · swipe-down/Space drops

title: Brick Breaker
rule: Move the paddle with your mouse — clear the bricks

title: Bubble Shooter
rule: Aim, fire, match 3+ to pop

title: Bulls and Cows
rule: Crack the 4-digit code in 8 tries · ● right spot · ○ right digit

title: Centipede
rule: Arrows move · Space fires · reach 200

title: Checkers
rule: 8x8 draughts vs the CPU — forced captures, kings

title: Chess
rule: You are White — checkmate the CPU

title: Color Match
rule: Tap the COLOUR the word is printed in — not what it says. 30 seconds

title: Connect 4
rule: Drop discs and line up four — you are red

title: Crazy Eights
rule: Match the suit or rank — 8s are wild. First to empty their hand wins

title: Cribbage
rule: Peg to 121 — fifteens, pairs, runs

title: Cycle Duel
rule: Two riders, one keyboard — box the other in

title: Dice Duel
rule: Roll three dice vs the CPU — higher total wins the round. Best of 5

title: Dots and Boxes
rule: Draw lines, complete boxes, avoid giving the CPU a free one

title: Duel Pong
rule: Two players, one device — first to 7 wins

title: Euchre
rule: Trump-trick battle — first to 10 points vs CPU

title: Fruit Match
rule: Swap neighbours to line up 3+ · chain combos for power-ups

title: Fruit Slice
rule: Swipe to slice fruit — dodge the bombs

title: Gin Rummy
rule: Meld sets & runs — knock with 10 or less deadwood

title: Go Fish
rule: Ask for ranks and collect four-of-a-kind books

title: Golf
rule: Lowest 6-card total wins — swap and flip to cut your score

title: Gomoku
rule: Five in a row on the 12x12 board vs the CPU

title: Hearts
rule: Duck the hearts and the Q♠ — lowest score wins

title: Higher or Lower
rule: Guess the next card. Build a streak — one wrong call ends the run

title: Jetpack Kiwi
rule: Hold to boost, release to fall · dodge lasers

title: Kings Corner
rule: Empty your hand onto the cross — Kings open corners

title: Kiwi Crossing
rule: Arrow keys — hop to the top, dodge cars & rivers

title: Kiwi Dino
rule: Space/↑ jump · ↓ duck · reach 150

title: Kiwi Flyer
rule: Tap / Space to fly · dodge the gaps · gets harder

title: Kiwi Hunt
rule: Local 2P: arrows-prey vs mouse-hunter · 45s

title: Kiwi Jump
rule: Steer left/right — auto-bounce up the tower, it gets harder

title: Kiwi Surfers
rule: Dodge, jump & slide — reach

title: Kiwi Unicorns
rule: Gather a stable of 6 unicorns before the rival

title: Lane Hopper
rule: Hop across scrolling lanes without getting hit

title: Light Cycles
rule: Arrow keys turn. Outlast the CPU rider

title: Lights Out
rule: Tap a tile to flip it and its neighbours — turn them all off

title: Mastermind
rule: Crack the 4-colour code in 8 tries · ● right spot · ○ right colour

title: Maze
rule: Arrow keys or WASD — find your way to the green exit

title: Memory Match
rule: Find all 8 pairs

title: Meteor Dodge
rule: Arrow keys weave — dodge as long as you can, chase your best

title: Minesweeper
rule: Clear the board without hitting a mine

title: Mini Sudoku
rule: Fill the 6×6 grid — 1–6 in every row, column, and box

title: Missile Command
rule: Click / tap to intercept — defend your cities

title: Nonogram
rule: Fill the 8×8 grid to match the row and column clues

title: Number Slide
rule: Slide tiles into order (1–8). Stuck? You can skip after 30s

title: Odd One Out
rule: Tap the tile that is a slightly different shade. It gets harder each level

title: Old Maid
rule: Match pairs — don\u2019t hold the odd queen

title: Pac-Kiwi
rule: Arrow keys. Eat the dots, dodge ghosts — grab a power-pellet to chase them

title: Pig (Dice)
rule: Roll to build points, but a 1 wipes your turn. Hold to bank. First to 50 wins

title: Pipes
rule: Rotate tiles to connect the source to the drain

title: Pong
rule: First to 3 beats the CPU. Mouse or ↑↓ to move

title: Reaction Test
rule: Click the instant it turns green — five rounds

title: Reversi
rule: Flank the CPU’s discs — most discs when the board fills wins

title: Rhythm Taps
rule: Hit D F J K in time with the falling notes — 45 seconds

title: Rock Paper Scissors
rule: Best of 5 against the computer

title: Rummy 500
rule: Meld sets & runs, lay off, race to 500

title: Simon
rule: Watch the sequence, then repeat it — reach round

title: Skip-Bo
rule: Empty your stock first — feed the 1→12 piles

title: Snake
rule: Arrow keys. Eat 10 apples — keep going for more

title: Snap
rule: Hit SNAP the instant two card ranks match — beat the CPU

title: Sokoban
rule: Arrow keys — push every box onto a ringed target. You can push but not pull

title: Solitaire
rule: Klondike. Build A→K by suit. Tap a card, then its spot

title: Space Invaders
rule: Arrows to move · Space to fire · clear the wave

title: Spades
rule: Bid your tricks, then take them — spades are trump

title: Speed
rule: Shed every card onto the piles — one rank up or down. Real-time vs CPU

title: Star Blaster
rule: Arrows move · Space fires · Clear the swarm

title: Sumo Kiwis
rule: Shove your rival off — best of 5 (2 players)

title: Tank Duel
rule: Two-player battle — first to 5 hits wins

title: Texas Hold'em
rule: Hole cards, flop, turn, river — best hand vs 3 CPUs takes the pot

title: Tic-Tac-Toe
rule: You are X — beat the computer

title: Tower Stack
rule: Tap/Space to drop · align the blocks

title: Tri-Peaks Solitaire
rule: Clear the pyramid — take any exposed card one rank above or below the base (A wraps to K). Draw a new base from the stock when stuck

title: Two Kiwis
rule: Co-op! Both kiwis reach their exits together

title: Typing Test
rule: Type the sentence as fast and accurately as you can

title: War
rule: Flip a card each round — higher card wins. Best of 9

title: Whack-a-Mole
rule: Tap moles, dodge bombs — score 12 in 30s

title: Word Ladder
rule: Change one letter at a time (real words only) to reach the target

title: Word Search
rule: Find all 8 hidden words in the 10x10 grid
